title: Open Links in New Tab on Inbox Page
excerpt: If links in Inbox would leave the Inbox tab open, it would be more intuitive. The inbox would remain exaclty in the state it was left when clicking links.

posts.author: MrOrange (Sean Craig)
posts.cookedHtml: If links in Inbox would leave the Inbox tab open, it would be more intuitive. The inbox would remain exaclty in the state it was left when clicking links.
